name: mfe-test
description: Projeto de estudo - Micro Frontends (MFE) com Module Federation

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd host && npm install && cd ../remote-header && npm install && cd ../remote-dashboard && npm install
scripts.build:remotes: cd remote-header && npm run build && cd ../remote-dashboard && npm run build
scripts.preview:remotes: concurrently "cd remote-header && npm run preview" "cd remote-dashboard && npm run preview"
scripts.dev: npm run build:remotes && concurrently "npm run preview:remotes" "npm run dev:host"
